content.en:
No one knew that Ye Tian was creating the Origin Divine Power, otherwise they would be dumbfounded, and their cognition would be broken.

What a long time of 100 million years, Ye Tian was preparing to retreat all the time in order to be able to create a physical body origin divine power, and the period would be uninterrupted.

Previously, although he had also been in retreat for a long time, he would occasionally go out of the retreat, which was not considered a long-term retreat.

But this time, he wanted to create a flesh-like origin divine power in one go.

As the years passed, the resources of the Great Universe became more and more abundant, and the cultivation environment became better and better, although it was still difficult to become a Heavenly Monarch, there were too many creatures in the Great Universe, and there were too many Heavenly Monarchs born.

In addition, many ancient Heavenly Monarchs have also stepped into the True Monarch level one by one.

The Heavenly Monarchs on the Heavenly Monarch List have changed batch after batch, and the later Heavenly Monarch List is far inferior to the first Heavenly Monarch List in terms of quality, after all, the first Heavenly Monarch List is the top Heavenly Monarch in Chaos, and it is the top Heavenly Monarch selected among countless Heavenly Monarchs in countless chaotic territories, but it is not comparable to a single big universe.

When these top-notch Heavenly Monarchs stepped into the half-step True Spirit or True Spirit realm, the other Heavenly Monarchs who made up later were weaker, and even the Heavenly Monarchs of the second grade before entered the Heavenly Monarch List.

But no matter what, it is an honor to be able to enter the Heavenly Monarch List!

Another 50 million years have passed, and the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden of the God of War Tower has advanced by leaps and bounds, surpassing countless predecessors and becoming the ninth Heavenly Monarch on the Heavenly Monarch List, which has really shocked countless people.

Although it was because many ancient and powerful Heavenly Monarchs had stepped into the half-step True Spirit, the fact that the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden was able to enter the ninth place on the Heavenly Monarch List was also a symbol of strength and potential.

And some of the other great forces True Descendant Disciples, Dao Ancestor Ancestors, and peerless Tianjiao are not much weaker than Yunzi Divine Maiden, and they are all at the top of the Heavenly Monarch List.

There are also many Heavenly Monarchs, the target is Ye Tian, and they all want to surpass Ye Tian.

But as time passed, they were never able to surpass Ye Tian, so they gradually gave up this idea, and instead chose to break through to the half-step True Spirit or even True Spirit realm, so that they could be regarded as surpassing Ye Tian in terms of strength.

......

The Tower of the God of War.

The Yun Zi Divine Maiden looked into the distance, which was the direction of the Void Heaven Temple.

"Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, with your progress speed, you should have already reached the limit of your spirit and spirit, why are you still in the ranks of Heavenly Monarchs? For us Dao Ancestors, the True Monarch and True Ancestor are the moments when the real potential is brought into play! The Heavenly Monarch level, the real limit is just like that, no matter how much you improve, it is useless!"

The Cloud Purple Priestess muttered.

However, she didn't know Ye Tian's situation, and if she knew that Ye Tian had fallen under the spell of the demon's ban, she wouldn't be confused.

If there was no demon forbidden spell, Ye Tian would have already impacted the half-step True Spirit, and even now he was already the first person of the True Monarch.

Of course, blessings and misfortunes depend on each other, Ye Tian fell under the spell of the evil demon's ban, but he was determined to impact the unity of spirit and spirit, and was expected to step into the level above the supreme true spirit.

And no matter how powerful the Yunzi Divine Maiden was, she could only condense a half-step Supreme True Spirit, and the two of them completely opened up the gap from the foundation.

Another 50 million years have passed.

With sufficient resources, the essence of the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden has reached the extreme, and a Chaos Divine Power has also been cultivated to the extreme realm, and she will no longer cultivate more Chaos Divine Powers, after all, she has stepped into the True Monarch level, and she can continue to cultivate Chaos Divine Powers, and she is not in a hurry.

As a result, the Yunzi Divine Maiden began to impact the half-step True Spirit Realm, and easily condensed the Half-Step Supreme True Spirit and stepped into the half-step True Spirit Realm.

For other half-step true spirits, it was very difficult to complete the fusion of the physical body and the true spirit, but the identity of the Yunzi Divine Maiden was not ordinary, and she naturally had treasures that accelerated the completion of the fusion.

With the assistance of this kind of treasure that accelerates fusion, the Yunzi Divine Maiden is sure that she will be able to complete ten percent of the fusion in ten million years and step into the True Monarch level.

And at this moment, Ye Tian was still in the realm of Heavenly Monarch.

It seems that Ye Tian has been surpassed by the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden, after all, no matter how powerful the Heavenly Monarch is, he is still a Heavenly Monarch, maybe he can easily kill an ordinary True Monarch in seconds, but a True Monarch like the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden can still be defeated by the Heavenly Monarch?

With the completion of the Yunzi Divine Maiden's one-part fusion, two-part fusion, until the completion of the ten-percent fusion, she has completely stepped into the realm of the True Monarch, representing the new generation of Tianjiao into the True Monarch Era.

And Ye Tian's reputation has dropped again and again, and it seems that people feel that his potential has really been exhausted, and he will not even be able to catch up with peerless Tianjiao and Dao Ancestor such as the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden in the future.

......

"The Flesh Origin Divine Power has finally been achieved!"

Ye Tian, who had been in retreat for 110 million years, ended his retreat, and a look of excitement appeared on his face that had not been seen for a long time.

This retreat was so long that he wanted to give up several times.

But he couldn't break through the half-step True Spirit Realm, so he finally held back and stayed in retreat until today, before he created a flesh-like origin supernatural power.

This Origin Divine Power is not powerful, it is a relatively general Origin Divine Power, but it is still a Origin Divine Power.

The moment it was successfully created, it was recognized by the Chaos Origin and became a true Origin Divine Power.

Ye Tian also gave this magical power a name, called the Blood River True Body!

Because to a certain extent, he borrowed the essence of the Blood River Immortal Technique.

The Blood River True Body's Origin Divine Power not only has a strong defense, but also can make Ye Tian transform into the Blood River Realm, and if the Blood River Realm is indestructible, he will not be destroyed, which is many times more powerful than the Blood River Immortal Technique.

In addition, the Blood River True Body can also suppress enemies, just like the physical realm.

In all aspects, the Blood River True Body has great potential, but because Ye Tian's background is too shallow, the power of the Blood River True Body is slightly weaker, and it is not as good as those top Origin Divine Powers.

Of course, Ye Tian can slowly improve in the future.

"The second step was a small success, the first Origin Divine Power was created, and it made a good start, leaving only the other two Origin Divine Powers. However, don't rush for the time being, let's go out for a walk first, otherwise if I continue to retreat, I will become mentally ill!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Immediately, he left the retreat room.

......

Ye Tian came out of the customs and saw a lot of unfamiliar faces, obviously the Heavenly Monarch who joined the Void Heaven Palace.

Even if Ye Tian didn't appear for 100 million years, no Heavenly Monarch would be disrespectful to him.

After all, it's just 100 million years, it's nothing to the Heavenly Monarch, and many Heavenly Monarchs don't say 100 million years, even if it's 10 billion years, they may not be able to improve their strength much.

Ye Tian went back to the Terran Race, and when he saw that the Terran was developing very well, he was very relieved.

Subsequently, Ye Tian took his wife Xiao Yue to travel for hundreds of years and visited many places in the big universe.

After that, Ye Tian returned to the Void Heaven Hall and began the retreat again.

In this way, Ye Tian retreated once in a while, and continued to study the divine power-type chaos supernatural power and the soul-type origin supernatural power.

Divine power type chaos magic power is relatively rare, because this kind of chaos magic power is very weak and weak, does not contain any attributes, nor does it contain any avenue, pure energy type chaos magic power, that is, a special combination of energy, will enhance the exertion of energy to the extreme.

Soul-type Chaos Divine Powers are also relatively rare, powerful Soul-type Chaos Divine Powers are terrifying, and weak soul-type Chaos Divine Powers are relatively average.

However, Ye Tian had already asked someone to collect these two types of Chaos Divine Powers, plus a batch of them that had been exchanged from the Void Heaven System, so it was enough for Ye Tian to use them for research.

It's just that if you want to create these two types of Origin Divine Powers, it takes more mental energy and more time.

The time Ye Tian gave himself was 500 million years!

In 500 million years, from research to the creation of the original supernatural power.

This is just Ye Tian's preliminary estimate, whether it can be achieved or not, he can't say for sure, but if people don't push themselves, no one knows how much potential they have!

In the process of researching and creating, Ye Tian gradually forgot all the disputes in the outside world.

During this period, there were even some Heavenly Monarchs who were immeasurable and tried to challenge Ye Tian in vain, but he didn't care.

Even, some people deliberately slandered him, and he didn't care.

To him, those people were just clowns.

He has only one goal, that is, to create a divine power-type origin supernatural power and a soul-type origin supernatural power, and then try to combine the three origin supernatural powers into an innate class of origin supernatural powers, so as to complete the unity of essence and spirit in one fell swoop and create miracles.

Once he accomplished this goal, the path of Dao Ancestor would be unimpeded for him.

At that time, he was the future Dao Ancestor!
